description: Open the Landsat 7 RGB image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat7_rgb.tif. Resample the image to a target width of 400 pixels using Bilinear upsampling and Mean downsampling. Save the resampled product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat7_resampled and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat7_resampled.tif.
